name: Mi-Memory: A Lifecycle Memory Framework for Personal AI
summary: arXiv:2607.18975v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Personal AI is moving beyond chat-only interaction toward continuous services that span phones, cars, homes, wearables, cameras, and tools. In this s...
description: arXiv:2607.18975v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Personal AI is moving beyond chat-only interaction toward continuous services that span phones, cars, homes, wearables, cameras, and tools. In this setting, memory cannot remain a cache of prior conversations. It should serve as a continuity and governance substrate: preserving durable user state, grounding answers in multimodal and device evidenc...
author: Xule Liu, Hanlin Teng, Chao Li, Yanan Ni, Shuo Lu, Audrey Wang, Yijun Liu, Yunfei Wang, Xiaofeng Li, Xian Yi, Yuanfa Li, Kang Zhao, Jian Liang, Yuxuan Chen, Jinyuan Chen, Heng Qu, Kun Shao, Jian Luan
